channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Aquila's Jukebox
item.description: Jukebox mod, simple as.

item.title: Immersive Body Temperature
item.description: Prepare for summer! Makes hot climates as challenging as cold ones.

item.title: Locust Drider Race (Drocust)
item.description: D&D drider, but turned into locust instead of spider

item.title: RKN Generic Crafting
item.description: Generic crafting system that completely replaces the UI grid with a more immersive mechanic

item.title: ClimateScalePatch
item.description: ClimateScalePatch modifies climate map generation during worldgen.

item.title: Equus: Wild Horses 2.0
item.description: Adds tameable wild horses to the game, successor to Equus: Wild Horses

item.title: Glider Timer
item.description: Allows you to set a configuration for a countdown in between glider uses, default is 5.

item.title: Launcher Mod Updater
item.description: An in-game mod updater that allows to download new updates for enabled mods.

item.title: Immersive Backpacks
item.description: An overhaul of backpack behavior and rendering in Vintage Story.

item.title: Status Hud Continued
item.description: Displays status information on the HUD.

item.title: fish(wastaken)'s Classes
item.description: some classes I made, using features taken from GlooMeClasses and Rustbound Magic.

item.title: Flower Seeds
item.description: Use a knife to turn flowers into seeds!

item.title: VS Director
item.description: VS Director workspace with camera paths, replay, action workflows, and live offscreen recording.

item.title: CB Nametags
item.description: Nametag mod for more customization for my personal server.

item.title: CB Harmony Patches
item.description: Harmony patches for my personal server.

item.title: Murlok Vintage Server Patch
item.description: Collection of tweaks for the Murlok server and playthrough.

item.title: topohorizon
item.description: Extends visible terrain far past the set view distance, with a camera zoom for distant peaks.

item.title: topographer
item.description: A worldgen mod that builds real-world places from elevation data.

item.title: DWC Classes
item.description: Custom classes for DWC's private server.

item.title: Layout
item.description: Layout tool that produces inert, uninteractable 2D/3D voxel guidelines in various shapes.

item.title: GamepadCompanionVS
item.description: Native gamepad support for Vintage Story 1.22+ — 12-slot radial menu, virtual cursor for GUI, etc.

item.title: Scrap Metal
item.description: A whole bunch of rusty scrap weapons and tools you can make

item.title: Dar's Server Utilities
item.description: Combines my mods with the intent to be used specifically on Sundered Isles Server

item.title: Iron Blooms to Ingots By Hand
item.description: Adds a recipe for blooms to iron ingots in the crafting grid.

item.title: The Crown & The Coalition Server Tweaks
item.description: Server tweaks for The Crown & The Coalition.

item.title: Craftable Sleek Doors
item.description: Adds a recipe for sleek doors.

item.title: De-Craftable Labeled Chests
item.description: Adds a recipe to seperate a sign from a labeled chest.

item.title: De-Craftable Raw Bricks
item.description: Adds recipes to turn raw bricks back into clay.

item.title: NDL ExpandedGrowth (Flower Growth Module)
item.description: Adds a method for growing/farming flowers!

item.title: Zenith: Assimilation
item.description: Forge your path to Apotheosis. Consume Creatures, take their traits and become the ultimate lifeform
